scenario.key_phrase: Can you tell me about EMI options?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Hello! Am I speaking with Jyoti? This is Priya from PhysicsWallah. I hope I'm not disturbing you. I'm calling regarding your inquiry about our JEE courses. How are you doing today?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Hi Priya! Yes, this is Jyoti. I'm doing well, thank you. Haan, I did inquire about JEE courses on your website. I'm looking for some guidance actually.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: That's wonderful, Jyoti! I'm here to help you. Can you tell me which class you're currently in? And are you specifically preparing for JEE Main or JEE Advanced?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: I'm in Class 12 right now. I'm targeting JEE Main primarily, but if I do well, then maybe Advanced bhi try karunga. The thing is, my exam is in about 10 months, so I'm a bit worried about the time.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Bilkul theek hai, Jyoti! 10 months is actually a good amount of time for focused preparation. For JEE 2027, I'd recommend our JEE Lakshya batch - it's specifically designed for students like you. The course includes comprehensive coverage, doubt solving, and regular tests. What's your current preparation level like?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: My preparation is okay, I think. I've covered most of Physics and Math, but Chemistry mein thoda weak hun. The Lakshya course sounds good, but I'm concerned about the fees. Can you tell me about the pricing and EMI options?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Of course! The JEE Lakshya 2027 course is priced at ₹35,999. But don't worry about paying it all at once - we offer 0% EMI through PW Pay starting at just ₹3,499 per month. That's less than what most families spend on daily chai! We also have JEE Arjuna at ₹19,999 with EMI of ₹1,999 per month if budget is a concern.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Hmm, even the Arjuna course EMI is quite a bit for my family. What's the difference between Lakshya and Arjuna? And do you have any other alternatives that might be more affordable?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: I understand your concern, Jyoti. Lakshya is our premium batch with live classes, personalized doubt solving, and more practice material. Arjuna covers all essential topics but with recorded lectures and standard support. Both are excellent for JEE prep. The investment is really worth it - our students have great success rates. Would you like to discuss this with your parents before deciding?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Yes, that would be helpful. I definitely need to talk to my parents about this. The courses sound good, but it's a big decision financially. Can you call me back tomorrow evening? I should have discussed it with them by then.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Absolutely, Jyoti! That's completely understandable. I'll call you tomorrow evening around this time. Meanwhile, I'll send you detailed course brochures on WhatsApp so you can show your parents exactly what's included. What's the best time to call you tomorrow - around 7 PM theek hai?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: 7 PM sounds perfect. Please do send the brochures - that will help me explain everything to my parents properly. One quick question though - if I join, when would the classes start?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Great question! Classes are already running, but don't worry - you can access all previous recorded lectures immediately after enrollment. Plus, we provide catch-up sessions for new joiners. I'll include the class schedule in the brochure. Anything else you'd like to know before I call you tomorrow?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: I think that covers everything for now. Thank you so much for explaining everything clearly, Priya. I'll discuss with my parents and wait for your call tomorrow at 7 PM.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Perfect, Jyoti! Thank you for your time today. I'll send you the brochures within the next hour, and I'll call you tomorrow at 7 PM sharp. Best of luck with your preparation, and I'm confident we can find the right solution for you. Take care!

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Thank you so much, Priya! Looking forward to your call tomorrow. Have a good day!
